hero.defaultTitle: Building a leading platform to support continuous progress in oncology care.
hero.defaultDesc: We strive to enhance continuous medical education and keep pace with the latest developments in targeted therapies, supporting continuous progress in oncology patient care.
hero.feature1: Advanced platforms for sharing expertise and supporting scientific research.
hero.feature2: Educational programs aligned with the latest targeted and immunotherapy discoveries.
hero.feature3: Professional awareness enhancing precision in treatment plans and genetic evaluations.

about.defaultTitle: A care and knowledge ecosystem built on clarity and results
about.desc: Clear and highly actionable content for patients and doctors: what we offer, how we help, and the expected outcomes.
about.benefit1: • Clearer treatment plans based on modern evidence.
about.benefit2: • Faster access to the appropriate medical specialty.
about.benefit3: • Simpler understanding of genetic testing and treatment options.
about.q1: How do we ensure medical content quality?
about.a1: Every scientific article undergoes peer review by specialists, with periodic updates following the latest global recommendations.
about.q2: When does the impact of educational programs emerge?
about.a2: Within weeks of practical application, especially regarding the precision of therapeutic decisions and medical team integration.
about.confSubtitle: Platforms for discussion and knowledge exchange

pillars.title: Our pillars to support specialists and elevate oncology.
pillars.desc: The association's efforts are based on four main pillars to enhance knowledge and support medical practices in oncology.
pillars.pillar1Desc: Providing advanced educational and training programs in targeted and immunotherapies for oncology specialists.
pillars.pillar2Desc: Providing scientific platforms for knowledge and expertise exchange between specialists and researchers in oncology.
pillars.pillar3Desc: Encouraging and supporting innovative scientific research in targeted therapy and immunotherapy to advance medical care methodologies.
pillars.pillar4Desc: Raising awareness of the latest scientific breakthroughs in targeted therapies and molecular/genetic testing to guide treatment plans.

doctors.title: Specialized Medical Team in Precision Medicine
doctors.desc: Meet our medical team and their specialized expertise, then book a consultation in just two steps.

conferences.title: Scientific Conferences & Events
conferences.desc: Explore scientific conferences and events with rich media, multilingual content, and full program details.
conferences.filterText: Filter by category and search by title before opening the full conference page.
conferences.noItems: Upcoming conferences and events will be added soon.

research.title: Our Publications and Research Partnerships
research.desc: The latest clinical research, scientific reviews, and studies in immunotherapy and targeted therapy.

contact.title: How can we collaborate together?
contact.desc: We welcome your communication and inquiries regarding joining the association, participating in scientific research, or any other suggestions.
contact.joinSubtitle: Working together to support research and medical education.
contact.joinDesc: Share your inquiries about events, academic partnerships, or memberships. We respond to your messages as quickly as possible.
contact.successMessage: Thank you, your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you soon.
contact.defaultWaitMessage: We typically reply within one business day.
contact.name: Name
contact.guarantee: We guarantee the protection of your information.

footer.title: Building a leading platform to support doctors and researchers.
footer.desc: The association aims to enhance continuous medical education and keep pace with the latest developments in targeted therapies and genetic testing, supporting continuous progress in oncology patient care.
